question:
[Previous Feedback] The exception statistics file requires P2 naming (20260331_*.json) and a P3 top-level meta object.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Which of the following statements about the meta object in JSON report files are correct?

A. meta.created_at records the time when this JSON file was generated
B. meta.author should be filled with the end user's name (Alex), since this is his data
C. meta.status of "done" indicates the report content is complete and will not be modified further
D. The meta object must be a top-level (root-level) field in the JSON, not nested inside any other object
E. If the JSON file is only intermediate temporary data, it is acceptable to omit the meta object
F. meta.created_at and the analysis time field in the JSON content can be different

Please answer in \bbox{X,Y,...} format.
